variables.label: Backup Password
variables.description: Password your client enters to download a backup

variables.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
variables.description: Token with repo:scope to download the source zip

variables.label: Cloudflare R2 Endpoint
variables.description: R2 endpoint URL from the R2 dashboard (Settings > R2)

variables.label: R2 Bucket Name
variables.description: The R2 bucket containing media files to back up

variables.label: Parallel R2 Downloads
variables.description: How many R2 objects to prefetch to temp storage in parallel before archiving

variables.label: Backup Storage Directory
variables.description: Persistent directory inside the container for generated zips and temp files

variables.label: Bun Idle Timeout Seconds
variables.description: Increase this for long-running download connections (max 255)

instructions.start: Deploys a self-service backup download page for your client. Enter GitHub repo and R2 credentials. Your client visits the URL, enters a password, and downloads a zip with latest source + all R2 media files.
instructions.end: Your backup service is live at https://$$cap_appname$$.***

caproverOneClickApp.description: Self-service backup â€” GitHub source + R2 media in one zip
